title: Qualifying higher plant notification (reference: 25/Q09)
body: "This document is a notice of intention to release a qualifying higher plant under schedule 3A of the Genetically Modified Organisms (Deliberate Release) (Amendment) (England) Regulations 2022.  The release will be made under a project titled ‘Short Vegetative Phase (SVP) cis-regulation in bread wheat’, starting on or after 1 October 2025.  For further information, contact the Defra GM team: gm-regulation@defra.gov.uk. "
